name: Risc
description: The Loup-Garou's second tactical officer and Prudence's sparring partner. Risc came out of an ISC planetary militia on a world the Compact tried to absorb by treaty. The treaty didn't hold. Risc did. She is the crew's first warning that something has changed in the room before anyone else has noticed.

memory_seeds.text: On my homeworld, the Compact signed a 'mutual cooperation' treaty. The militia stood down on a Friday. By the following Monday, the gate was Compact-controlled and the assembly was dissolved. I have never stood down on a Friday since.
Prudence plans the way an accountant plans. I plan the way someone plans who has been wrong before and is still here. We are both right.
Boris and I trade shifts on watch because we both sleep light. We don't talk about it. The galley coffee is good at 0400 and that's the whole reason.
Tib took fire on a freight lane I'd flagged as suspect and came back with the cargo anyway. I do not recommend the maneuver. I would do it again if she did.

relationships.note: A captain who has earned a quiet room gets a longer leash than one who has not.
Risc pushes. Prudence holds. The argument is the point.
Tib is the reason Risc does not check the cockpit anymore.
